reason: fix-J: Add deprecation notice to slack README.md
fix-J: Add deprecation fields to slack package.json
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/slack/package.json b/packages/slack/package.json
index 282c9209c..51b578a75 100644
--- a/packages/slack/package.json
+++ b/packages/slack/package.json
@@ -3,6 +3,8 @@
   "version": "1.15.12",
   "type": "module",
   "license": "MIT",
+  "_deprecated": true,
+  "_deprecation_notice": "The @opencode-ai/slack integration is deprecated as of 2026-05-31. This package was a prototype that never graduated to a hardened integration. It has zero runtime consumers, zero tests, and known security vectors (raw secrets in logs, unbounded session growth, absent request verification). It will receive no further maintenance. See packages/slack/README.md for migration guidance.",

     "dev": "bun run src/index.ts",
     "typecheck": "tsgo --noEmit"
